elementary.title: A2 Past simple: Form and use
elementary.content:
📌 Cách dùng chính
• Hành động đã kết thúc: I saw Jim yesterday.
• Thói quen trong quá khứ: I often played in the park when I was a child.
• Tình huống trong quá khứ: My grandfather had two brothers.
• Thứ tự thời gian: I arrived home, took off my shoes and relaxed.
📐 Công thức
Khẳng định: S + V2/ed (I worked / I went)
Phủ định: S + didn't + V (I didn't work / I didn't go)
Câu hỏi: Did + S + V? (Did you work? / Did you go?)
⚠️ Quy tắc thêm -ed
• Thông thường: walk -> walked
• Kết thúc bằng -e: live -> lived
• Kết thúc bằng phụ âm + y: study -> studied
• Kết thúc bằng 1 nguyên âm + 1 phụ âm: stop -> stopped

exercises.q: We ___ to Vancouver on holiday last year.
exercises.exp: Past simple of go is went

exercises.q: ___ you go by plane?

The car suddenly ___.
When she arrived, he ___ at home.
The police ___ the robber yesterday.
I ___ a black shirt for the gala.
The meeting ___ well.
Manchester United ___ the final.
How much ___ for the car?
exercises.opts: did you pay,payed you,did you payed,you paid

passage.text: Last summer, I {{1}} (go) to Paris. I {{2}} (stay) in a small hotel. Every morning, I {{3}} (eat) a croissant. I {{4}} (visit) many museums. I {{5}} (see) the Eiffel Tower. I {{6}} (not/speak) much French, but I {{7}} (learn) some words. The weather {{8}} (be) beautiful. I {{9}} (meet) some nice people. I {{10}} (have) a great time.

Yesterday {{1}} (be) a busy day. I {{2}} (wake up) at 6 AM. I {{3}} (make) breakfast. Then I {{4}} (drive) to work. I {{5}} (finish) my report. At noon, I {{6}} (have) lunch with a friend. We {{7}} (talk) about our plans. I {{8}} (leave) the office at 5 PM. I {{9}} (buy) some groceries. I {{10}} (cook) dinner at home.

When I {{1}} (be) a child, I {{2}} (live) in a small village. I {{3}} (go) to a local school. I {{4}} (have) many friends. We {{5}} (play) football every day. Sometimes we {{6}} (climb) trees. I {{7}} (not/like) studying, but I {{8}} (love) reading. My teacher {{9}} (be) very kind. She {{10}} (give) me many books.

Last weekend, we {{1}} (visit) London. We {{2}} (take) the train. The journey {{3}} (be) two hours. We {{4}} (arrive) at noon. First, we {{5}} (find) our hotel. Then we {{6}} (walk) to the river. We {{7}} (see) Big Ben. We {{8}} (not/have) much money, so we {{9}} (eat) sandwiches. We {{10}} (return) home on Sunday.

My grandfather {{1}} (be) a sailor. He {{2}} (travel) all over the world. He {{3}} (see) many amazing things. He {{4}} (tell) us many stories. He {{5}} (not/be) afraid of storms. He {{6}} (love) the sea. He {{7}} (have) a big ship. He {{8}} (meet) many people. He {{9}} (bring) us gifts. We {{10}} (listen) to him for hours.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể chi tiết về kỳ nghỉ hè đáng nhớ nhất của bạn (bạn đã đi đâu, đi cùng ai, những hoạt động chính bạn đã tham gia và cảm xúc của bạn sau chuyến đi đó).
writing_prompts.example: Last summer, I went to Da Nang with my family for a five-day vacation. We stayed in a beautiful hotel near the beach and visited many famous places like Ba Na Hills and Hoi An Ancient Town. I enjoyed the delicious local food and felt very happy because we spent a lot of quality time together.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả về một ngày bận rộn của bạn trong tuần vừa qua (bạn đã thức dậy lúc mấy giờ, bạn đã làm những công việc gì và bạn đã kết thúc ngày hôm đó như thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: Last Monday was a very busy day for me as I woke up at 6 AM to prepare for an important presentation. I went to the office early, had several meetings with my team, and finally finished my report by 5 PM. Although I felt quite tired, I was satisfied with my work and relaxed at home with a good book.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một kỷ niệm thời thơ ấu mà bạn nhớ nhất (bạn đang ở đâu, bạn đang làm gì, ai đã ở đó cùng bạn và tại sao kỷ niệm đó lại quan trọng với bạn).
writing_prompts.example: When I was a child, I lived in a small village and I remember playing football with my friends every afternoon in the local field. One day, we won a small tournament and I felt so excited that I couldn't sleep that night. This memory is important to me because it reminds me of my happy and simple childhood.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả về một người mà bạn đã gặp trong quá khứ và để lại ấn tượng sâu sắc (người đó là ai, bạn gặp họ ở đâu, họ đã nói hoặc làm gì khiến bạn nhớ mãi).
writing_prompts.example: I met an old teacher ten years ago at my high school who inspired me to pursue my dream of becoming a writer. She told me that I had a special talent for storytelling and encouraged me to practice every day. I was deeply impressed by her kindness and I will never forget her valuable advice.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một sự kiện quan trọng đã xảy ra trong cuộc đời bạn (sự kiện đó là gì, nó đã thay đổi cuộc sống của bạn như thế nào và bạn đã học được điều gì từ đó).
writing_prompts.example: An important event happened in my life when I graduated from university and moved to a big city to start my first job. This experience changed my life completely because I had to learn how to live independently and manage my own finances. I learned that hard work and perseverance are the keys to success in the future.

elementary.title: A2 Past continuous and past simple
elementary.content:
📌 Phân biệt
• Past Continuous: Hành động đang diễn ra tại một thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ (I was studying at 9).
• Past Simple: Hành động đã hoàn thành (I studied yesterday).
🔗 Kết hợp (When/While)
• Hành động dài (Continuous) bị cắt ngang bởi hành động ngắn (Simple).
• Example: He was playing football when he broke his arm.
• Example: While I was walking, it started to rain.
📐 Công thức Past Continuous
Khẳng định: S + was/were + V-ing
Phủ định: S + wasn't/weren't + V-ing
Câu hỏi: Was/Were + S + V-ing?

exercises.q: I ___ down while I ___ down the stairs.
exercises.opts: fell / was going,was falling / went,fell / went,was falling / was going

exercises.q: He ___ very fast when he ___ the accident.
exercises.opts: was driving / had,drove / was having,drove / had,was driving / was having
exercises.exp: Long action (driving) interrupted by short action (accident)

exercises.q: It ___ when we ___ home.
exercises.opts: was snowing / left,snowed / were leaving,snowed / left,was snowing / were leaving

exercises.q: I ___ your call because I ___.
exercises.opts: didn't answer / was working,wasn't answering / worked,didn't answer / worked,wasn't answering / was working
exercises.exp: Completed action (didn't answer) vs action in progress (working)

exercises.q: ___ you paying attention when you ___ your car?

exercises.q: While I ___ for the bus, I ___ my friend.
exercises.opts: was waiting / met,waited / was meeting,waited / met,was waiting / was meeting

exercises.q: What ___ you ___ at 8 PM last night?

exercises.q: They ___ dinner when the lights ___ out.

exercises.exp: Long action interrupted by short action

exercises.q: We ___ TV when we ___ a loud bang.

passage.text: Last night at 8 PM, I {{1}} (sit) in my living room. I {{2}} (watch) a movie when suddenly I {{3}} (hear) a strange noise outside. I {{4}} (get up) and {{5}} (look) through the window. It {{6}} (rain) heavily. A man {{7}} (run) down the street. He {{8}} (not/wear) a coat. While I {{9}} (watch) him, he {{10}} (disappear) around the corner.

Yesterday morning, while I {{1}} (walk) to work, I {{2}} (see) an old friend. He {{3}} (wait) for a bus. We {{4}} (stop) and {{5}} (talk) for a few minutes. While we {{6}} (chat), the bus {{7}} (arrive). He {{8}} (say) goodbye and {{9}} (get) on the bus. I {{10}} (continue) my walk to the office.

When the teacher {{1}} (enter) the classroom, the students {{2}} (not/study). Some {{3}} (talk) loudly, and others {{4}} (draw) on the board. One boy {{5}} (look) out of the window. He {{6}} (watch) some birds. The teacher {{7}} (shout) 'Quiet!'. Everyone {{8}} (sit) down immediately. While she {{9}} (open) her book, the bell {{10}} (ring).

I {{1}} (have) a very strange dream last night. I {{2}} (walk) in a dark forest. The sun {{3}} (not/shine). Suddenly, I {{4}} (see) a giant bird. It {{5}} (fly) above the trees. While I {{6}} (hide) behind a bush, the bird {{7}} (land) on the ground. It {{8}} (look) at me. I {{9}} (scream) and then I {{10}} (wake up).

While my mother {{1}} (cook) dinner, my father {{2}} (read) the newspaper. My sister {{3}} (do) her homework. Suddenly, the lights {{4}} (go) out. We {{5}} (not/know) what to do. My father {{6}} (find) a candle. While he {{7}} (light) it, we {{8}} (hear) a knock at the door. It {{9}} (be) our neighbor. He {{10}} (want) to borrow a flashlight.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một sự việc bất ngờ xảy ra khi bạn đang làm một việc gì đó (bạn đang làm gì, sự việc đó là gì, nó đã cắt ngang hoạt động của bạn như thế nào và bạn đã xử lý ra sao).
writing_prompts.example: While I was walking to the park yesterday, I suddenly saw a small kitten stuck in a tree. I stopped my walk and tried to help it get down safely. It was a very surprising moment, but I felt happy when the kitten finally reached the ground and ran back to its owner.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một tai nạn nhỏ hoặc một tình huống hài hước đã xảy ra khi bạn đang làm việc nhà hoặc nấu ăn (bạn đang làm gì, điều gì đã xảy ra và kết quả thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: I was cooking dinner for my friends last night when I accidentally dropped a whole bowl of flour on the floor. My face was completely white, and everyone started laughing at my funny appearance. We had to spend thirty minutes cleaning the kitchen, but it was a memorable and hilarious evening.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả khung cảnh khi bạn bước vào một căn phòng hoặc một bữa tiệc (mọi người đang làm gì, không khí lúc đó ra sao và bạn đã làm gì tiếp theo).
writing_prompts.example: When I entered the room, everyone was dancing and the music was playing very loudly. The atmosphere was incredibly energetic and I saw my friends laughing and having a great time. I joined them immediately and we spent the rest of the night celebrating and enjoying the wonderful party.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn gặp lại một người quen cũ một cách tình cờ (bạn đang ở đâu, bạn đang làm gì lúc đó và cuộc trò chuyện diễn ra như thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: I was shopping at the mall last weekend when I met an old high school friend by chance. He was waiting for his wife near a coffee shop, so we decided to sit down and talk for a while. We reminisced about our school days and shared updates about our current lives and careers.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một giấc mơ kỳ lạ mà bạn còn nhớ (bạn đang ở đâu trong giấc mơ, những sự kiện gì đang diễn ra và bạn cảm thấy thế nào khi thức dậy).
writing_prompts.example: I was dreaming that I was flying over a giant ocean when suddenly a huge storm appeared in the sky. I felt very scared as the wind was blowing strongly against me, but then I woke up and realized I was safe in my bed. It was such a strange dream that I still remember every detail.

elementary.title: A2 Past perfect
elementary.content:
📌 Cách dùng
Dùng để nói về một hành động xảy ra trước một hành động khác trong quá khứ.
• Example: When I arrived, she had left. (Cô ấy đi trước khi tôi đến).
📐 Công thức
Khẳng định: S + had + V3/ed (I'd seen)
Phủ định: S + hadn't + V3/ed (I hadn't seen)
Câu hỏi: Had + S + V3/ed? (Had you seen?)
⚠️ Phân biệt 'd
• 'd + infinitive = would (I'd love to go).
• 'd + past participle = had (I'd eaten).

She gave me a T-shirt that she ___ in the sales.

exercises.exp: Past perfect for experience before a past time

We were hungry because we ___ (not/have) breakfast.
exercises.exp: Not having breakfast before feeling hungry

exercises.q: I recognized her because I ___ (meet) her before.

passage.text: When I {{1}} (arrive) at the station, the train {{2}} (already/leave). I {{3}} (be) very upset because I {{4}} (buy) my ticket online. I {{5}} (not/know) what to do. I {{6}} (call) my friend, but she {{7}} (go) to work. I {{8}} (realize) that I {{9}} (forget) my phone at home. It {{10}} (be) a terrible morning.

Yesterday, I {{1}} (go) to the library to return a book that I {{2}} (borrow) two weeks before. When I {{3}} (get) there, I {{4}} (see) that the library {{5}} (close). I {{6}} (not/check) the opening hours. I {{7}} (be) very disappointed because I {{8}} (walk) for thirty minutes. I {{9}} (decide) to come back the next day. I {{10}} (hope) it would be open.

Sarah {{1}} (feel) very nervous before her exam. She {{2}} (not/sleep) well the night before. She {{3}} (study) hard for months, but she {{4}} (fear) that she {{5}} (forget) everything. When she {{6}} (start) the test, she {{7}} (realize) that she {{8}} (know) most of the answers. She {{9}} (be) so relieved. She {{10}} (pass) with a high score.

When we {{1}} (reach) the top of the mountain, we {{2}} (be) exhausted. We {{3}} (climb) for six hours. The view {{4}} (be) amazing. We {{5}} (never/see) anything like it before. We {{6}} (take) many photos. My friend {{7}} (bring) some sandwiches that his mother {{8}} (make). We {{9}} (eat) them quickly. We {{10}} (feel) very proud of ourselves.

I {{1}} (not/recognize) my cousin at first. I {{2}} (not/see) him for ten years. He {{3}} (change) a lot. He {{4}} (grow) a beard and he {{5}} (lose) weight. We {{6}} (start) talking about our childhood. He {{7}} (tell) me that he {{8}} (move) to Australia. He {{9}} (be) there for three years. We {{10}} (have) a lot to catch up on.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn đến muộn trong một sự kiện quan trọng (bạn đã đến đâu, tại sao bạn lại muộn và khi bạn đến thì mọi chuyện đã diễn ra như thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: I arrived late for my best friend's wedding ceremony last Saturday because I had forgotten the exact location of the church. By the time I got there, the ceremony had already finished and everyone was taking photos outside. I felt very embarrassed, but I apologized and joined the celebration later.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả cảm giác của bạn khi hoàn thành một công việc khó khăn mà bạn đã chuẩn bị từ lâu (công việc đó là gì, bạn đã nỗ lực ra sao và kết quả đó có ý nghĩa gì).
writing_prompts.example: I felt incredibly relieved when I finally finished my final university project last month because I had prepared for it for over six months. I had worked hard every night to research and write the report, and achieving a high grade was a very important goal for my future career.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn nhận ra mình đã quên một thứ gì đó quan trọng (bạn đang ở đâu, bạn đã quên gì và điều đó đã gây ra rắc rối gì cho bạn).
writing_prompts.example: I was already at the airport when I suddenly realized that I had forgotten my passport at home on the kitchen table. I felt extremely worried because my flight was leaving in two hours and I had to take a taxi back to get it. Fortunately, I managed to return just in time for boarding.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một nơi mà bạn đã quay lại sau nhiều năm (nơi đó đã thay đổi như thế nào so với lần cuối bạn ở đó và cảm xúc của bạn ra sao).
writing_prompts.example: I returned to my hometown last summer after I had lived in the city for ten years, and I was surprised by how much it had changed. The local government had built many new buildings and parks, but the old school where I had studied was still there. I felt very nostalgic and happy to see my old neighbors.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn gặp lại một người mà bạn đã không thấy trong một thời gian dài (người đó là ai, họ đã thay đổi như thế nào và hai bạn đã nói gì).
writing_prompts.example: I met my cousin again last week at a family reunion after I hadn't seen him for nearly fifteen years. He had changed a lot because he had grown much taller and had started his own business in another country. We talked for hours about our lives and shared many updates about our families.
